summary: Tested Process Flow page simplification (image-only, no bookmarks/notes) and new Holiday Calendar page. All critical features pass. Process Flow renders PDF as static image with right-click disabled. Holiday Calendar displays 24 holidays with correct stats (17 Gazetted, 6 Restricted, 1 Observance), proper color badges, and past holidays dimmed.

issues: Console warning: HTML hydration error - 'tr cannot be a child of span' due to React devtools wrapper. Not user-visible but should be addressed for clean console.

passed_tests: Process Flow: Page renders as static image (data-testid='process-flow-image')
Process Flow: No bookmark button present (removed)
Process Flow: No notes toggle button present (removed)
Process Flow: No page navigation controls (single image)
Process Flow: Image is not draggable
Holiday Calendar: Sidebar HR category has 'Holiday Calendar' link
Holiday Calendar: Page title shows 'Holiday Calendar 2026'
Holiday Calendar: Table displays 24 holiday rows
Holiday Calendar: Stats cards show 17 Gazetted Holidays
Holiday Calendar: Stats cards show 6 Restricted Holidays
Holiday Calendar: Stats cards show 1 Observance
Holiday Calendar: Gazetted Holiday badges have emerald color styling
Holiday Calendar: Restricted Holiday badges have amber color styling
Holiday Calendar: Observance badges have slate color styling
Holiday Calendar: Past holidays (before today) have opacity-50 class
Holiday Calendar: First holiday is Jan 1, 2026 - New Year's Day
Holiday Calendar: Last holiday is Dec 31, 2026 - New Year's Eve
critical_code_review_comments: ProcessFlowPage.js correctly uses PDF.js to render PDF as canvas, then converts to data URL for img tag
HolidayCalendarPage.js hardcodes 24 holidays with proper date format (YYYY-MM-DD) for comparison
Sidebar.js correctly routes 'Holiday Calendar' under HR to /hr/holiday-calendar
Past holiday detection uses date comparison with opacity-50 class for dimming effect
seed_data_creation: None - holidays are hardcoded in HolidayCalendarPage.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: Process Flow page now renders as single static image (no PDF viewer controls, bookmarks, or notes). Holiday Calendar is a new page at /hr/holiday-calendar with 24 hardcoded holidays. Sidebar has data-testid selectors: holiday-calendar-link, process-flow-link, category-hr-toggle, category-operations-toggle. Page selectors: process-flow-page-title, process-flow-image, holiday-calendar-title, holiday-calendar-table, holiday-row-{0-23}.

process_flow_page.renders_as_image: ✓ PDF converted to img tag via canvas
